t6_hero.sub_en: Maison Loré is an editorial hair salon in Mayfair. Soft, lived-in colour, an unhurried chair, and a stylist who actually listens. By appointment only.

t6_stylists.title_en: A small team. One unhurried chair at a time.
t6_stylists.p1_en: Maison Loré is a three-stylist atelier in Mayfair. Léa, Hugo and Sofia each take one guest at a time, with an hour or more set aside for every appointment.
t6_stylists.p2_en: We do not double-book and we do not rush. Espresso when you arrive, a real consultation before the foils go on, and as much time at the chair as your hair needs.

t6_about_story.p1_en: Maison Loré opened in 2021 because its founder, Léa Moreau, wanted to build the salon she could never quite find: editorial training, salon-grade product, an unhurried chair, and a real conversation before any major change.
